title: citropsis mirabilis
intro: Citropsis mirabilis, also known as the "Miracle Citrus", is a tropical plant species native to West Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family of citrus fruits. The plant's leaves, bark, and roots are used in traditional medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Citropsis mirabilis are said to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
